login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.cardDescription: Use your email address and password

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Create a new account to get started

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescPrefix: We have sent a password reset link to
forgotPassword.errorMsg: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Please enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successDesc: You can now login with your new password. Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: The password reset link is missing or invalid.
resetPassword.errorMsg: Failed to reset password. The link might be expired.

verifyEmail.invalidLinkDesc: The verification link is missing or invalid.
verifyEmail.successDesc: Your email address has been successfully verified.
verifyEmail.noticeSubtitle: Please verify your email address to access your account.
verifyEmail.cardDescription: A verification link has been sent to your email.
verifyEmail.emailNote: This email address cannot be changed.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Verification email has been resent successfully.

logout.errorMsg: Server logout failed, but local session will be cleared.
